title: Arbeitsagentur Jobs Scraper ($0.30/1k results)
description: Search official German Federal Employment Agency job listings.

was.title: What
was.description: Job title, keyword, or occupation, for example Software Entwickler, Pflegefachkraft, Ausbildung, or Elektriker.

wo.title: Where
wo.description: City, postal code, or region, for example Berlin, Hamburg, Munich, or 10115.

umkreis.title: Search Radius
umkreis.description: Search radius in kilometers around the selected location.

arbeitszeit.title: Working Hours
arbeitszeit.description: Working-hours filters. Use one or semicolon-separated values: vz full-time, tz part-time, snw shift/night/weekend, ho home office, mj mini-job.

veroeffentlichtseit.title: Published Since
veroeffentlichtseit.description: Only return jobs published in the selected number of days.

arbeitgeber.title: Employer
arbeitgeber.description: Filter by employer or company name.

pav.title: Private Agencies
pav.description: Include listings from private employment agencies.

page.title: Page
page.description: Arbeitsagentur result page to fetch. Pagination starts at 1.

size.title: Results Per Page
size.description: Number of jobs to return in one request. Scrappa accepts 1 to 100.
